transcript: Master Yip, he is the king of boxing, you have to beat him with all your might. Master Yip, all Hong Kongers support you, give it your all. Master Yip, are you fighting for your own people or for Chinese martial arts? Dear audience, please be seated. The Chinese boxing competition has officially begun. Ladies and gentlemen, and now for the long-awaited Chinese Western Boxing Tournament, please give a roaring welcome to the undisputed champion of the world, The Twister!
